milestone: K-022 — /about 結構細節對齊 v2（12 項 AC）

items.text: K-022 closed：/about 頁面 12 項結構細節對齊設計稿 v2，含 DossierHeader bar、SectionLabelRow hairline、Hero 雙行（主句 Bodoni Moda + tagline italic）、5 section italic 副標、RedactionBar、Role Card OWNS/ARTEFACT Geist Mono label、Newsreader italic link、CASE FILE header、LAYER 1/2/3 prefix、role annotation（BEHAVIOUR/POSITION）、Role Card 3×2 grid 固定高度、shared primitives paper palette 遷移；Playwright 164 passed / 1 skipped / 0 failed，全流程一輪通過

milestone: K-021 — 全站設計系統基建（paper palette + 三字型 + NavBar + HomeFooterBar）

items.text: K-021 closed：5 路由 body 配色米白化（paper/ink token）、Bodoni Moda + Newsreader + Geist Mono 三字型系統上線、NavBar 米白化 + 項目順序重整、HomeFooterBar 擴至 /app 與 /business-logic；歷經 4 rounds（R1 設計→實作 / R2 子元件 dark-class 補修 / R3 architecture.md cross-table drift / R4 /about text-white readability fix-now），Playwright 115 passed + 1 skipped，K-022/K-023/K-024 前置基建完成

milestone: K-008 — 自動化視覺報告 script（Playwright 截圖 → HTML）

items.text: K-008 closed：新增 visual-report.ts 自動截圖 4 條路由產出 HTML 報告，playwright.config 拆 per-project testMatch 隔離 E2E 與 report；Reviewer 抓 4 Warnings 全本票內修（W1 module-level side effect、W3 scoped state、W4 TICKET_ID whitelist、S2 HTML gitignore）；tsc + Vitest 36 + Playwright 45 全綠

milestone: Codex Review Follow-up — K-009 / K-010 / K-011

items.text: K-011 closed：LoadingSpinner 新增 label prop，4 個 callsite 改為情境文案（載入日記中…/載入內容中…/Running prediction...）；tsc exit 0、Vitest 36 pass、Playwright 45/45 全綠；同步更新 architecture.md 對 LoadingSpinner 的描述
K-010 closed：修復 Vitest AppPage 回歸測試，補齊 chart-timeframe-* testid 相關斷言
K-009 closed：修復 1H predict 路徑遺漏 ma_history=_history_1d 的後端 bug，pytest 63 passed

milestone: K-005 — UnifiedNavBar 統一五頁導覽列

items.text: 新增 UnifiedNavBar 共用組件（auth.ts utility），統一 5 個頁面的 NavBar；修復 CRITICAL-1（useState re-render）、CRITICAL-2（desktop ⌂ active class）、mobile ⌂ active state 不一致；46 Playwright tests passing
補填 diary.json 4/8–4/11 缺漏里程碑（Early MA99 / Shared Forecast / Pearson Filter），修正 4/1 錯誤日期
更正 About 頁面過時描述：Railway 單服務架構改為 Firebase Hosting + Cloud Run 分離部署，移除 Phase 5 截圖說法
Deployed backend to Cloud Run (multi-stage Docker build); frontend to Firebase Hosting (k-line-prediction.web.app)
Fixed cross-origin API calls: added VITE_API_BASE_URL and centralised all fetch/axios calls through API_BASE utility
Set up feat/phase3-pages worktree; established common component library (useAsyncState, LoadingSpinner, ErrorMessage, SectionLabel, SectionHeader, CtaButton)
Completed all 4 pages (Home, About, Diary, BusinessLogic) with 35 components and 22 Playwright E2E tests passing
Added react-router-dom v7; refactored App.tsx → AppPage.tsx; wired BrowserRouter routes for /, /app, /about, /diary, /business-logic
Review: fixed orphaned App.tsx + incorrect @types/react-router-dom dependency; confirmed SPA catch-all is last route in main.py
Built POST /api/auth (bcrypt password check) and GET /api/business-logic (JWT-protected markdown endpoint) with TDD — tests written before implementation
Security: hmac.compare_digest for password comparison; HS256 algorithm pinned; env-var lazy loading for testability
PM defined ACs for all 4 pages; Architect produced full component tree + props interfaces for Phase 3; Designer built Pencil.dev designs for HomePage, BusinessLogicPage, AboutPage

Key decisions: FastAPI serves static files (single Railway service); no Route Guard on /business-logic (page is its own auth entry); Designer added TechStackSection (7th section) to AboutPage after review
以 30 天 Pearson 斜率取代手動 ma99_trend_override；趨勢判斷改由統計驗算，移除人工覆蓋欄位
統一所有時間戳為 UTC+0，修復 UTC+8 混用導致的顯示錯誤
加入共用 1H/1D Consensus Forecast UI；採 native timeframe API contract，直接傳 timeframe 給後端不做 bar 轉換

milestone: Early MA99 計算 + Match Trend Labels

items.text: 新增 /api/merge-and-compute-ma99 endpoint 與 computeMa99 function，提供後端 MA99 計算核心
前端上傳後立即觸發 MA99 計算（early loading state），提升操作體感速度
在 MatchList 每張 match card 新增 trend label（漲/跌/持平），從 projectedFutureBars 計算趨勢方向
